org.arakhne.neteditor.android.actionmode

Interface FigureActionModeManager

  • All Known Subinterfaces:
    ActionModeOwner
    All Known Implementing Classes:
    ActionModeManager

    public interface FigureActionModeManager
    Public interface that permits to access to the configuration services of a mode manager on Android platforms.
    Version:
    NetEditor Android Panel $Revision$ 2013-10-23 21:03:10
    Author:
    Stéphane GALLAND
    Maven Group Id:
    org.arakhne.neteditor
    Maven Artifact Id:
    neteditor-androidpanel

    • Method Summary

      Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      void addModeListener(ActionModeListener listener)
      Add listener on the mode events.
      void addSelectableInteractionListener(SelectableInteractionListener listener)
      Add listener on the figure interaction events.
      SelectionMode getSelectionMode()
      Replies the current mode of selection.
      void removeModeListener(ActionModeListener listener)
      Remove listener on the mode events.
      void removeSelectableInteractionListener(SelectableInteractionListener listener)
      Remove listener on the figure interaction events.
      void setSelectionMode(SelectionMode mode)
      Change the mode of selection.
      void startMode(ActionMode<Figure,DroidViewGraphics2D,Color> mode)
      Change the mode of selection.
